ordinanceLabel: Title 15 (Building) · Title 17 (Zoning) · Chapter 17.80 (ADU) | Industry Municipal Code via eCode360
fireAgency: LA County Fire Department (LACFD) — EPIC-LA portal
portal: BSOP (LA County Building & Safety Online Portal)
notes: Building and safety contracted to LA County Building & Safety (LACBS). Two-step process: City Planning clearance first, then LACBS building permit. No traditional residential zones — residential only in Housing Overlay Zone (I-HO, Ch. 17.22). Climate Zone 9. No WUI/FHSZ.
